rationale: Changed remediation action idempotency caching to include request-shaping fields so a reused key with a different action kind or dry-run flag is evaluated independently.
Added explicit supported authority mode validation so stale or unknown stored authority modes are denied before any allow path.
Automated review summary only; the actionable child review comments are classified separately.
Guarded the admin-auto risk comparison so malformed catalog entries with null risk do not raise KeyError.
Updated the absolute-path redaction regex to cover single-segment absolute paths and removed the redundant optional segment.
Automated review summary only; the actionable child review comments are classified separately.
Added a defensive null guard after sensitive-text redaction before applying regex substitutions.
